info.name: Swap Near - 跨链全网络全类型（Quote+Build）
info.description:
Near 渠道跨链测试（询价+构建一体）。每条用例先 quote 再 build，并携带 quoteResultCtx。

跨链支持网络：XRP、Tron、Ethereum、AVAX、Base、BSC、BTC、DOGE、Near、Solana
provider：SwapNear

稳定币金额统一使用 100；主币按 2026-06-03 市价近似折算 ~100 USD。quote 使用普通 `/swap/v1/quote` JSON 接口，build 使用 `/swap/v1/build-tx`。Near 的 build 需携带 quoteResultCtx，否则容易落到通用 500。

item.name: Build+Quote - Near - 跨链全网络全类型

exec: function cv(key, fallback){ return pm.collectionVariables.get(key) || fallback; } function q(params){ return Object.entries(params).filter(function(kv){ return kv[1] !== undefined && kv[1] !== null; }).map(function(kv){ return encodeURIComponent(kv[0]) + '=' + encodeURIComponent(String(kv[1])); }).join('&'); } function hs(obj){ return Object.entries(obj).map(function(e){ return { key: e[0], value: String(e[1]) }; }); }

function skipText(v){ return String(v == null ? '' : v).trim(); }

function providerMatches(actual, provider){ var name = skipText(actual).toLowerCase(); var base = skipText(provider).toLowerCase(); if (!name || !base) return false; var variants = [base]; if (base.indexOf('swap') === 0) variants.push(base.slice(4)); if (base.indexOf('oneinch') >= 0) variants.push('1inch'); if (base.indexOf('1inchfusion') >= 0) variants.push('fusion'); if (base.indexOf('exodusbridge') >= 0 || base.indexOf('exodus') >= 0) variants.push('exodus'); variants = variants.filter(Boolean); return variants.some(function(v){ return name === v || name.indexOf(v) >= 0; }); }
function skipProviderEntry(data, provider){ return (data || []).find(function(entry){ return providerMatches((entry && entry.info && entry.info.provider) || entry.provider || '', provider); }); }
function quoteEntryError(entry){ return skipText((entry && entry.errorMessage) || (entry && entry.info && entry.info.errorMessage) || ''); }

function skipIsTimeoutError(err){ var text = skipText(err && (err.message || err.reason || err)).toLowerCase(); return text.indexOf('timeout') >= 0 || text.indexOf('timed out') >= 0 || text.indexOf('超时') >= 0; }
function skipIsMessageSkippable(msg){ return ['Provider error', '渠道商异常', '报价不可用'].indexOf(skipText(msg)) >= 0; }

function markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, reason, detail){ var label = '[' + caseName + '] SKIP ' + provider + ' ' + reason + (detail ? ' | ' + detail : ''); pm.test(label, function(){ pm.expect(true).to.eql(true); }); console.warn(label); }

function handleQuoteTransportSkip(caseName, provider, err, status){ if (skipIsTimeoutError(err)) { markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, 'quote timeout', skipText(err && (err.message || err.reason || err))); return true; } var code = Number(status); if ([502, 503, 504].indexOf(code) >= 0) { markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, 'quote HTTP ' + code, 'upstream'); return true; } return false; }

function handleQuotePayloadSkip(caseName, provider, data, providerEntry, detail){ var arr = Array.isArray(data) ? data : []; if (!arr.length) { markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, 'quote empty data', detail || 'data=[]'); return true; } var entry = providerEntry || skipProviderEntry(arr, provider); if (entry && skipIsMessageSkippable(quoteEntryError(entry))) { markQuoteSkip(caseName, provider, 'quote ' + quoteEntryError(entry), detail || ('provider=' + provider)); return true; } return false; }

function runCase(i){ if(i >= CASES.length){ console.log('done'); return; } var c = CASES[i]; pm.sendRequest({ url: BASE_URL + '/swap/v1/quote?' + q({ fromTokenAddress: c.fromTokenAddress, toTokenAddress: c.toTokenAddress, fromTokenAmount: c.amount, fromNetworkId: c.fromNetworkId, toNetworkId: c.toNetworkId, protocol: 'Swap', userAddress: c.userAddress, slippagePercentage: '0.5', autoSlippage: 'true', receivingAddress: c.receivingAddress, kind: 'sell', toTokenAmount: '', denySingleSwapProvider: '' }), method: 'GET', header: hs(quoteHeaders) }, function(err, res){ if (err) { if (handleQuoteTransportSkip(c.name, PROVIDER, err)) { runCase(i + 1); return; } pm.test('[' + c.name + '] quote 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err.toString()); }); runCase(i + 1); return; } if (handleQuoteTransportSkip(c.name, PROVIDER, null, res.code || res.status)) { runCase(i + 1); return; }

pm.test('[' + c.name + '] quote HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(res.code || res.status).to.equal(200); }); var j = res.json(); pm.test('[' + c.name + '] quote 业务码 0', function(){ pm.expect(j.code).to.eql(0); }); var data = Array.isArray(j.data) ? j.data : []; var providers = data.map(function(x){ return (x && x.info && x.info.provider) || x.provider || ''; }).filter(Boolean); var entry = data.find(function(x){ var p = (x && x.info && x.info.provider) || x.provider || ''; return p === PROVIDER || String(p).toLowerCase().indexOf('near') >= 0; }); if (handleQuotePayloadSkip(c.name, PROVIDER, data, entry, 'providers=' + JSON.stringify(providers))) { runCase(i + 1); return; } pm.test('[' + c.name + '] Near 有效报价', function(){ if (!entry) { pm.expect.fail('providers=' + JSON.stringify(providers)); } pm.expect(entry.errorMessage, 'Near 条目携带 errorMessage: ' + (entry && entry.errorMessage)).to.be.oneOf([undefined, null, '']); var hasQuote = entry.toAmount || entry.fromAmount || (entry.info && entry.info.toAmount); pm.expect(hasQuote).to.be.ok; }); if (!entry) { runCase(i + 1); return; } var ctx = entry.quoteResultCtx || (entry.info && entry.info.quoteResultCtx) || null; pm.test('[' + c.name + '] quoteResultCtx 存在', function(){ pm.expect(ctx, 'nearQuote=' + JSON.stringify(entry)).to.be.ok; }); if (!ctx) { runCase(i + 1); return; } var body = { fromTokenAddress: c.fromTokenAddress, toTokenAddress: c.toTokenAddress, fromTokenAmount: c.amount, toTokenAmount: String(entry.toAmount || (entry.info && entry.info.toAmount) || '0'), fromNetworkId: c.fromNetworkId, toNetworkId: c.toNetworkId, protocol: 'Swap', provider: PROVIDER, userAddress: c.userAddress, receivingAddress: c.receivingAddress, slippagePercentage: 0.5, kind: 'sell', walletType: 'hd', quoteResultCtx: ctx }; pm.sendRequest({ url: BASE_URL + '/swap/v1/build-tx', method: 'POST', header: hs(buildHeaders), body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify(body) } }, function(err2, res2){ if (err2) { pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build 请求失败', function(){ pm.expect.fail(err2.toString()); }); runCase(i + 1); return; } pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build HTTP 200', function(){ pm.expect(res2.code || res2.status).to.equal(200); }); var j2 = res2.json(); pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build 业务码可接受', function(){ pm.expect([0, 20033, 20699].indexOf(j2.code) >= 0, 'code=' + j2.code + ', message=' + j2.message).to.eql(true); }); if (j2.code === 0) { pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build data 存在', function(){ pm.expect(j2.data).to.be.ok; }); } if (j2.code === 20033) { pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build 命中报价失效兜底', function(){ pm.expect(String(j2.message || '')).to.include('报价不可用'); }); } if (j2.code === 20699) { pm.test('[' + c.name + '] build 命中余额/网络费预检', function(){ pm.expect(String(j2.message || '')).to.include('网络费用'); }); } runCase(i + 1); }); }); }
